channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Road furniture left behind, 14th March
item.description:
Top of Brockhampton road down towards Winchcombe

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sevenhampton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Pothole, 14th March
item.description:
Pothole going south on the A417.

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 14th March
item.description:
Householdwaste dumped at entrance to Glynbridge Gardens - Saturday 14 March

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Village Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 45cm x 60cm pothole, 14th March
item.description:
The pothole is located in front of house 6 Hazlewood close, and it is becoming deeper and larger. It has been here for more than a month.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Hazlewood Close, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large piece of electrical equipment dumped, 14th March
item.description:
This looks like an industrial printer I think. It has appeared in the gateway near the railway bridge in the last couple of days, on the road out of Syreford towards Andoversford

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Andoversford, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Super dangerous. Just saw someone s tyre go into this, 14th March
item.description:
Outside main hedge of no 17 Greenhills road on main road. A very busy road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 104, Charlton Lane, Naunton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bricks loose in road, 14th March
item.description:
The brick infill that connects to block road to the tarmac section is all loose and creating a nasty bump and also noise when cars rattle the bricks. A team “fixed” this issue several years ago but the repair didn’t last and seems to have made the problem worse.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grenville Close, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two bed bases dumped, 14th March
item.description:
Thanks for dealing with this.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Benhall Avenue, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car not moved for months, 14th March
item.description:
Barksdale Winchcombe

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barksdale, Winchcombe, Winchcombe

item.title: 14inch pothole outside 8 Barksdale, 14th March
item.description:
Right outside number 8 Barksdale on the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barksdale, Winchcombe, Winchcombe
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Volunteer litter pick bags ready for collection, 14th March
item.description:
Cheltenham Road, Longlevens. Opposite Pearman Briggs Caravans. Next to dog waste bin 0273.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Longlevens, Gloucester

item.title: Damaged Paving Around Stop Tap 'Fixed' with Plastic Pavement Cover, 14th March
item.description:
Outside 3 Alexandra Street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Alexandra Street, Warden Hill, Cheltenham

item.title: Fallen tree, 14th March
item.description:
A large brach has snapped off from a tree by Wotton Brook in Lilliesfield Avenue. It is lying on the ground. The removal of this and the surrounding overgrown vegetation would be appreciated.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lilliesfield Avenue, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass is too long and unplayable for football matches, 14th March
item.description:
The grass on the football pitch is too long and almost unplayable for matches. We are playing here the next few weeks - please can it be cut before the match next Saturday morning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blake Croft, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep potholes, 14th March
item.description:
Several massive and deep potholes on roundabout heading towards Swindon that can cause damage to tyres and wheels. Another gender pothole exist on the A417 further down on the tarmac section that leads to the start of concreted road surface.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Air Balloon Roundabout, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building rubble on verge outside 152, 14th March
item.description:
Pile of rubble outside 152 Brooklyn road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 101, Brooklyn Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Timetable has graffiti, 14th March
item.description:
Reporting this because saw it on Facebook, it’s at the D stop in the Homelands

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Sunrise Avenue, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet
